title: Resource Inventory, Delivery Evidence, Budgets, and Performance Boundaries · Compiler Case: Resource Graph

Predict authorization, URL identity, runtime admission, Promise ownership, resource bounds, accessibility impact, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Inventory document, script, style, image, font, media, preload, module, and third-party references with initiator and scope evidence.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Resource Graph model · Theory Resource Graph, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: The HTML page byte count represents total page weight.
